compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Ebb & Flow submersible pump, drip irrigation pump, NFT pump
compatible_devices.notes: Controls any mains-powered irrigation or recirculation pump up to 10A (2300W) via on/off switching. Separate irrigation interval (1–16h) and duration (1s–20min) for day and night cycles. Day/night detection via integrated 4m light sensor cable. IP54 housing. Suitable for Ebb & Flow, drip, NFT, and aeroponic systems. No temperature or EC/pH input — pure timer function.
